label: Precept
description: Defines a single ideological precept - a belief, ritual role, taboo, or behavior rule - that belongs to an ideology.

preceptClass.label: Precept class
preceptClass.description: C# Precept subclass instantiated at runtime for this precept.

issue.label: Issue
issue.description: The ideological issue this precept belongs to.

comps.label: Comps
comps.description: List of PreceptComp objects that attach modular behaviors to this precept.

abilityStatFactors.label: Ability stat factors
abilityStatFactors.description: Stat multipliers applied per ability the pawn possesses.

statOffsets.label: Stat offsets
statOffsets.description: Flat stat offsets granted by this precept.

statFactors.label: Stat factors
statFactors.description: Stat multipliers granted by this precept.

conditionalStatAffecters.label: Conditional stat affecters
conditionalStatAffecters.description: Stat offsets and factors that apply only when a specific condition is met.

selectionWeight.label: Selection weight
selectionWeight.description: Weight used when randomly selecting this precept for an ideology.

opposedWorkTypes.label: Opposed work types
opposedWorkTypes.description: Work types this precept's followers are unwilling to perform.

impact.label: Impact
impact.description: How strongly this precept affects ideology uniqueness and selection rules.

associatedMemes.label: Associated memes
associatedMemes.description: Memes that make this precept more likely to be selected.

conflictingMemes.label: Conflicting memes
conflictingMemes.description: Memes that prevent this precept from being selected.

requiredMemes.label: Required memes
requiredMemes.description: All of these memes must be present for this precept to be selectable.

visible.label: Visible
visible.description: Whether this precept is visible in the ideology editor.

visibleOnAddFloatMenu.label: Visible on add float menu
visibleOnAddFloatMenu.description: Whether this precept appears in the add-precept float menu.

listedForRoles.label: Listed for roles
listedForRoles.description: Whether this precept is listed as a role precept in UI.

takeNameFrom.label: Take name from
takeNameFrom.description: Another precept whose name this precept inherits.

alsoAdds.label: Also adds
alsoAdds.description: Another precept automatically added alongside this one.

maxCount.label: Max count
maxCount.description: Maximum number of times this precept can be added to an ideology.

isNonIdeoRitual.label: Is non-ideo ritual
isNonIdeoRitual.description: If true, this precept is treated as a non-ideology ritual.

exclusionTags.label: Exclusion tags
exclusionTags.description: Only one precept with the same exclusion tag can be in an ideology.

allowDuplicates.label: Allow duplicates
allowDuplicates.description: If true, multiple copies of this precept can exist in the same ideology.

ignoreLimitsInEditMode.label: Ignore limits in edit mode
ignoreLimitsInEditMode.description: If true, placement limits are ignored in the ideology editor.

canUseAlreadyUsedThingDef.label: Can use already used thing def
canUseAlreadyUsedThingDef.description: If true, this precept can reference a ThingDef already used by another precept in the ideology.

classic.label: Classic
classic.description: If true, this precept is a classic precept available in classic ideology creation.

classicExtra.label: Classic extra
classicExtra.description: If true, this precept is treated as an extra classic precept.

defaultSelectionWeight.label: Default selection weight
defaultSelectionWeight.description: Selection weight used as a default when no other weight is specified.

enabledForNPCFactions.label: Enabled for NPC factions
enabledForNPCFactions.description: If true, NPC factions can have ideologies with this precept.

countsTowardsPreceptLimit.label: Counts towards precept limit
countsTowardsPreceptLimit.description: If false, this precept does not count toward the ideology's precept slot limit.

canGenerateAsSpecialPrecept.label: Can generate as special precept
canGenerateAsSpecialPrecept.description: If true, this precept can be generated as a special precept during world generation.

nameMaker.label: Name maker
nameMaker.description: Grammar rule pack used to generate names for this precept's instances.

nameMaxLength.label: Name max length
nameMaxLength.description: Maximum character length for generated precept names.

preceptInstanceCountCurve.label: Precept instance count curve
preceptInstanceCountCurve.description: Curve that maps ideology size to the number of this precept's instances.

ritualPatternBase.label: Ritual pattern base
ritualPatternBase.description: Base ritual pattern def this precept's ritual follows.

receivesExpectationsQualityOffset.label: Receives expectations quality offset
receivesExpectationsQualityOffset.description: If true, ritual quality offsets are applied based on expectations.

usesIdeoVisualEffects.label: Uses ideo visual effects
usesIdeoVisualEffects.description: If true, the ritual uses the ideology's visual effects.

mergeRitualGizmosFromAllIdeos.label: Merge ritual gizmos from all ideos
mergeRitualGizmosFromAllIdeos.description: If true, ritual gizmos from all ideologies are merged into one.

allowSpectatorsFromOtherIdeos.label: Allow spectators from other ideos
allowSpectatorsFromOtherIdeos.description: If true, pawns from other ideologies can spectate this ritual.

allowOptionalRitualObligations.label: Allow optional ritual obligations
allowOptionalRitualObligations.description: If true, optional obligations can be added to this ritual.

classicModeOnly.label: Classic mode only
classicModeOnly.description: If true, this precept only appears in classic ideology creation mode.

buildingDefChances.label: Building def chances
buildingDefChances.description: Maps ThingDef names to selection weights for ideology buildings. Each child element name is a ThingDef defName and its text is the weight.

buildingMinExpectations.label: Building min expectations
buildingMinExpectations.description: Minimum expectation levels at which ideology buildings are required.

buildingRoomRequirements.label: Building room requirements
buildingRoomRequirements.description: Room requirements the ideology building's room must meet.

buildingRoomRequirementsFixed.label: Building room requirements (fixed)
buildingRoomRequirementsFixed.description: Fixed room requirements that always apply regardless of other conditions.

roomRequirementCountCurve.label: Room requirement count curve
roomRequirementCountCurve.description: Curve controlling how many room requirements are active at a given expectation level.

leaderRole.label: Leader role
leaderRole.description: If true, this precept defines the ideology's leader role.

activationBelieverCount.label: Activation believer count
activationBelieverCount.description: Minimum number of believers needed to activate this role. -1 means always active.

deactivationBelieverCount.label: Deactivation believer count
deactivationBelieverCount.description: Believer count below which this role deactivates. -1 means never deactivates.

roleRequirements.label: Role requirements
roleRequirements.description: Requirements a pawn must meet to hold this role.

roleDisabledWorkTags.label: Role disabled work tags
roleDisabledWorkTags.description: Work tags the role pawn is forbidden from performing. Each <li> is one WorkTags flag name.

roleRequiredWorkTags.label: Role required work tags
roleRequiredWorkTags.description: Work tags the role pawn must be capable of performing. Each <li> is one WorkTags flag name.

roleRequiredWorkTagAny.label: Role required work tag (any)
roleRequiredWorkTagAny.description: Role pawn must be capable of at least one of these work tags. Each <li> is one WorkTags flag name.

roleApparelRequirements.label: Role apparel requirements
roleApparelRequirements.description: Apparel requirements the role pawn must satisfy.

roleApparelRequirementCountCurve.label: Role apparel requirement count curve
roleApparelRequirementCountCurve.description: Curve mapping colonist wealth or count to the number of apparel requirements enforced.

grantedAbilities.label: Granted abilities
grantedAbilities.description: Abilities granted to the role pawn.

roleEffects.label: Role effects
roleEffects.description: Effects applied to the pawn holding this role.

roleTags.label: Role tags
roleTags.description: Tags used to filter or match this role in game systems.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Texture path for the precept icon.

restrictToSupremeGenderChance.label: Restrict to supreme gender chance
restrictToSupremeGenderChance.description: Probability that this role is restricted to the ideology's supreme gender.

certaintyLossFactor.label: Certainty loss factor
certaintyLossFactor.description: Multiplier on certainty loss for believers with this precept.

convertPowerFactor.label: Convert power factor
convertPowerFactor.description: Multiplier on this precept's effectiveness during ideological conversion.

expectationsOffset.label: Expectations offset
expectationsOffset.description: Integer offset applied to colonist expectations.

createsRoleEmptyThought.label: Creates role empty thought
createsRoleEmptyThought.description: If true, a negative thought is given when the role has no assigned pawn.

roleCanBeChild.label: Role can be child
roleCanBeChild.description: If true, a child pawn can hold this role.

disallowLoggingCamps.label: Disallow logging camps
disallowLoggingCamps.description: If true, followers of this precept disapprove of logging camps.

disallowMiningCamps.label: Disallow mining camps
disallowMiningCamps.description: If true, followers of this precept disapprove of mining camps.

disallowHuntingCamps.label: Disallow hunting camps
disallowHuntingCamps.description: If true, followers of this precept disapprove of hunting camps.

disallowFarmingCamps.label: Disallow farming camps
disallowFarmingCamps.description: If true, followers of this precept disapprove of farming camps.

approvesOfSlavery.label: Approves of slavery
approvesOfSlavery.description: If true, this precept indicates approval of slavery.

prefersNudity.label: Prefers nudity
prefersNudity.description: If true, followers prefer to go without clothing.

genderPrefersNudity.label: Gender prefers nudity
genderPrefersNudity.description: Only this gender prefers nudity when prefersNudity is set.

useChoicesFromBuildingDefs.label: Use choices from building defs
useChoicesFromBuildingDefs.description: If true, building selection uses the choices defined in building defs rather than buildingDefChances.

displayOrderInImpact.label: Display order in impact
displayOrderInImpact.description: Sort order of this precept within its impact tier in the ideology editor.

displayOrderInIssue.label: Display order in issue
displayOrderInIssue.description: Sort order of this precept within its issue in the ideology editor.

proselytizes.label: Proselytizes
proselytizes.description: If true, followers actively try to convert others to this ideology.

requiredScars.label: Required scars
requiredScars.description: Number of scars required for the role pawn.

approvesOfCharity.label: Approves of charity
approvesOfCharity.description: If true, this precept indicates approval of charitable acts.

blindPawnChance.label: Blind pawn chance
blindPawnChance.description: Chance (0–1) that the role pawn is blind. -1 disables this.

approvesOfBlindness.label: Approves of blindness
approvesOfBlindness.description: If true, this precept indicates approval of blindness.

canRemoveInUI.label: Can remove in UI
canRemoveInUI.description: If true, this precept can be removed in the ideology editor.

prefersDarkness.label: Prefers darkness
prefersDarkness.description: If true, followers prefer to live and work in darkness.

enablesNeeds.label: Enables needs
enablesNeeds.description: Needs enabled for believers when this precept is active.

disablesNeeds.label: Disables needs
disablesNeeds.description: Needs disabled for believers when this precept is active.

blindPsychicSensitivityOffset.label: Blind psychic sensitivity offset
blindPsychicSensitivityOffset.description: Psychic sensitivity offset applied to blind pawns following this precept.

defaultDrugPolicyOverride.label: Default drug policy override
defaultDrugPolicyOverride.description: Drug policy assigned by default to believers of this precept.

warnPlayerOnDesignateChopTree.label: Warn player on designate chop tree
warnPlayerOnDesignateChopTree.description: If true, a warning is shown when the player orders tree chopping.

warnPlayerOnDesignateMine.label: Warn player on designate mine
warnPlayerOnDesignateMine.description: If true, a warning is shown when the player designates mining.

willingToConstructOtherIdeoBuildables.label: Willing to construct other ideo buildables
willingToConstructOtherIdeoBuildables.description: If true, followers will construct buildings belonging to other ideologies.

biosculpterPodCycleSpeedFactor.label: Biosculpter pod cycle speed factor
biosculpterPodCycleSpeedFactor.description: Multiplier on biosculpter pod cycle speed for this precept's followers.

growthVatSpeedFactor.label: Growth vat speed factor
growthVatSpeedFactor.description: Multiplier on growth vat speed for this precept's followers.

prefersSlabBed.label: Prefers slab bed
prefersSlabBed.description: If true, followers prefer sleeping on slab beds.

useRepeatPenalty.label: Use repeat penalty
useRepeatPenalty.description: If true, a penalty is applied for performing the same ritual repeatedly.

showRitualFloatMenuOption.label: Show ritual float menu option
showRitualFloatMenuOption.description: If true, this ritual appears in the float menu.

tipLabelOverride.label: Tip label override
tipLabelOverride.description: Override label shown in tooltips for this precept.

capitalizeAsTitle.label: Capitalize as title
capitalizeAsTitle.description: If true, the precept label is capitalized as a proper title.

ignoreNameUniqueness.label: Ignore name uniqueness
ignoreNameUniqueness.description: If true, generated names do not need to be unique.

extraTextPawnDeathLetter.label: Extra text pawn death letter
extraTextPawnDeathLetter.description: Additional text appended to the letter sent when the role pawn dies.

apparelPreceptSwapDef.label: Apparel precept swap def
apparelPreceptSwapDef.description: Precept that replaces this one when nudity-related apparel preferences change.

useCooldownFromAbilityGroupDef.label: Use cooldown from ability group def
useCooldownFromAbilityGroupDef.description: Ability group whose cooldown this precept's ability shares.

iconIgnoresIdeoColor.label: Icon ignores ideo color
iconIgnoresIdeoColor.description: If true, the precept icon is not tinted by the ideology color.

sourcePawnRoleDef.label: Source pawn role def
sourcePawnRoleDef.description: Precept that acts as the role source for this precept's ability.

sourceAbilityDef.label: Source ability def
sourceAbilityDef.description: Ability def that is the source of this precept.

likesHumanLeatherApparel.label: Likes human leather apparel
likesHumanLeatherApparel.description: If true, followers appreciate wearing human leather apparel.

approvesOfRaiding.label: Approves of raiding
approvesOfRaiding.description: If true, this precept indicates approval of raiding other factions.

skipOpportunityLettersBeforeDay.label: Skip opportunity letters before day
skipOpportunityLettersBeforeDay.description: Number of days after colonist arrival before opportunity letters are shown.

notifyPlayerOnOpportunity.label: Notify player on opportunity
notifyPlayerOnOpportunity.description: If true, the player is notified when an opportunity arises for this precept.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# PreceptWorker subclass used to implement custom precept behavior.
